author: gb9t
content: Iteration 7: microsoft/mana.md committed (c999eda, 225 lines). Azure MANA — completes the cloud-perimeter NIC trio (AWS ENA + GCP gVNIC + Azure MANA all now have unified Tier-3 coverage with identical adversarial-firmware trust model). Three-layer architecture (shm_channel → gdma → hw_channel/mana_en) maps cleanly to Rust: ShmChannel as single-use type consumed on handshake, typed AuxDev<Eth>/<Ib> separation enforces sub-driver-name allowlist at compile time. Grsec posture: shm-channel handshake parser strict+bounded (only attacker-controlled surface pre-MSI-X), HWC opcode/EQE-type allowlists, recovery rate-limit, per-vport queue cap, request_id wrap-check. Total mlx5 family: 4, cloud-perimeter NICs: 3, Intel ice pre-existing: 1. Next iteration target: drivers/net/ethernet/broadcom/bnxt/ (Broadcom BCM57500 100G, deployed Azure HC-series + bare metal cloud — completes the 'big 4' high-end server NIC vendors).
